subject: [PATCH v2 13/18] hpfs: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-01.patch_summary: This patch converts the HPFS (High Performance File System) iomap operations to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which is a helper function that finishes previous mappings and produces the next one. The conversion uses the iomap_process() helper and does not introduce any functional changes. The patch modifies the hpfs_iomap_ops structure to replace the ->iomap_begin callback with ->iomap_next.
